description: Fix remaining test failures on EC2: replace execSync shell spawning with direct spawnSync calls to avoid /bin/sh ENOENT in vitest workers

userStories.title: Replace execSync prisma calls with spawnSync to avoid /bin/sh ENOENT
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all tests to pass on EC2 Ubuntu 24.04 where vitest worker threads cannot find /bin/sh.
acceptanceCriteria: All test files that call `execSync(...)` with prisma are updated to use `spawnSync` with `shell: false` instead

The pattern to use: replace `execSync(\`${process.cwd()}/node_modules/.bin/prisma db push --skip-generate\`, { env: { ...process.env, DATABASE_URL: dbUrl }, stdio: 'pipe' })` with `const result = spawnSync(\`${process.cwd()}/node_modules/.bin/prisma\`, ['db', 'push', '--skip-generate'], { env: { ...process.env, DATABASE_URL: dbUrl }, stdio: 'pipe', shell: false }); if (result.status !== 0) throw new Error('prisma db push failed: ' + result.stderr?.toString())`
Add `import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'` (or change the existing `execSync` import to include `spawnSync`) in every affected file
All 78 test files pass on the EC2 host at /opt/claw-orchestrator
userStories.notes: Root cause: vitest worker threads on EC2 Ubuntu 24.04 m7g instances cannot find /bin/sh when execSync tries to spawn a shell. The fix is spawnSync with shell:false which bypasses /bin/sh entirely. Files affected: tests/e2e/*.test.ts and tests/integration/tc-005.test.ts, tc-008.test.ts, tc-009.test.ts, tc-010.test.ts, tc-014.test.ts, tc-016.test.ts, tc-021.test.ts, tc-022.test.ts, tc-024.test.ts, tc-027.test.ts, tc-028.test.ts, tc-029.test.ts, tc-030.test.ts, tc-031.test.ts, tc-032.test.ts and any others. Use `grep -rln 'execSync' tests/` to find all. The prisma binary path is already correct: `${process.cwd()}/node_modules/.bin/prisma`.

userStories.title: Verify 78/78 tests pass and push
userStories.description: As a developer, I want pnpm test to exit 0 on the EC2 host with all 78 test files passing.
acceptanceCriteria: All changes committed and pushed to origin
userStories.notes: Branch: ralph/fix-test-portability-ec2. Run `pnpm test` to confirm after fixes.
